# company_year_compustat.feather

## Description
Combined Compustat financial and company data from both US and Global datasets, harmonized and linked to Capital IQ company identifiers. Contains annual financial metrics and company identifiers for companies present in our transcript dataset. Dataset is unique by companyid-fiscal_year pairs, with US data prioritized over Global data when overlaps exist. Variables have been renamed from original Compustat codes to more descriptive names.

## Generated by
`src/pre_query/compustat/company_year_dataset.py`

## Variables

### companyid
Capital IQ company identifier from the transcript detail data. Float64 type. Primary key for linking to transcript data.

### fiscal_year
Fiscal year of the observation. Int64 type, can contain missing values. Primary key along with companyid.

### company_name
Company name as recorded in Compustat. String type. Renamed from original 'conm' variable.

### company_status
Company status indicator. Category type. Values: A (Active), I (Inactive). Renamed from original 'costat' variable.

### gvkey
Compustat Global Company Key - unique identifier for each company in Compustat. String type, zero-padded to 6 digits for consistency.

### market_value_total_mil
Market value of total capital in millions USD. Float64 type, can contain missing values. Renamed from original 'mkvalt' variable.

### employees_thousands
Number of employees in thousands. Float64 type, can contain missing values. Renamed from original 'emp' variable.

### currency_code
Currency code of the financial data (e.g., USD, EUR, JPY). Category type. Present for Global data, may be missing for US data. Renamed from original 'curcd' variable.

### data_date
Date of the financial data observation. Object type (date format). Renamed from original 'datadate' variable.

### gics_sector
GICS (Global Industry Classification Standard) sector code. Category type. Renamed from original 'gsector' variable.

### gics_industry
GICS industry code. Category type. Renamed from original 'gind' variable.

### gics_group
GICS industry group code. Category type. Renamed from original 'ggroup' variable.

### gics_subindustry
GICS sub-industry code. Category type. Renamed from original 'gsubind' variable.

### industry_format
Industry format classification. Category type. Values: INDL (Industrial companies), FS (Financial Services). When duplicates existed for the same gvkey-fyear, INDL was prioritized over FS. Renamed from original 'indfmt' variable.

### incorporation_country
Country of incorporation code (e.g., USA, CAN, GBR, DEU). Category type. Renamed from original 'fic' variable.

### domicile_country
Location/domicile country code. Category type. Renamed from original 'loc' variable.
